product_overview: StepForge backend collects step data from device sensors, persists and syncs it to Firebase, and exposes settings and backup endpoints for the mobile app. This PRD focuses on backend endpoints and testable API flows for step tracking, backup/sync, and user settings.
core_goals: Accurately record and retrieve user step counts and associated metadata.
Provide reliable backup and sync of user data to Firebase/Firestore.
Allow retrieval and update of user settings with proper auth and data validation.
Surface and document error cases (auth failures, server errors, zero/very high step counts, app-closed sessions) for testing and robustness.

features.name: Step Counter Service
features.description: Collect step events from device sensors, allow the mobile app to sync step batches to the backend and retrieve daily step records.
user_flows: POST /api/steps/sync with body {steps: <number>, timestamp: <ISO string>} and valid Authorization bearer token -> Receive 200 Success
GET /api/steps with query ?date=<YYYY-MM-DD> and valid Authorization bearer token -> Receive 200 with {steps: <number>, date: <string>}
POST /api/steps/sync with body {steps: 0, timestamp: <ISO string>} and valid Authorization bearer token -> Receive 200 Success (edge case: zero steps recorded)

POST /api/steps/sync with body {steps: <very large number>, timestamp: <ISO string>} and valid Authorization bearer token -> Receive 200 Success (edge case: high step count — verify server caps/validation)
POST /api/steps/sync with body {steps: <number>, timestamp: <ISO string>} and missing/invalid Authorization token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Sync Backup
features.description: Backup and sync aggregated user data to cloud storage/Firestore; intended for scheduled or manual backup operations from the client.
user_flows: POST /api/backup with body {data: <object>} and valid Authorization bearer token -> Receive 200 Backup successful
POST /api/backup with body {data: <object>} and valid Authorization bearer token but server-side failure (simulate DB/network error) -> Receive 500 Backup failed
POST /api/backup with body {data: <object>} and missing/invalid Authorization bearer token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Settings Management
features.description: Expose retrieval and update endpoints for user preferences stored in Firestore (e.g., units, daily step goal, sync preferences).
user_flows: GET /api/settings with valid Authorization bearer token -> Receive 200 Settings object
PUT /api/settings with body <Settings object> and valid Authorization bearer token -> Receive 200 Updated
PUT /api/settings with malformed body (invalid fields/types) and valid Authorization bearer token -> Receive 400 Bad Request (validate server-side schema)
GET /api/settings with expired/invalid Authorization bearer token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Step Counter Service
features.description: Tracks user steps using device sensors

features.name: Sync Backup
features.description: Backup and sync user data to cloud

known_limitations.impact: May break with future Google Play Services updates
Potential runtime errors in debug logging
